caption: Start at the repo README — the founder's own framing of what ECC is.
1.2k stars confirms the open-source traction claim from the deck.
Deterministic replay lives in src/replay.ts — the core technical moat.
The deck's headline claim: sub-100ms agent routing in production.
But the repo's own benchmark reports 340ms median — a direct contradiction.
Both sides ladder up to the same concept: agent orchestration performance.
Design-partner count is unsupported by any artifact — ask the founder.
